criteria.reason: Document runner passes extracted source text into the document LLM analyzer.
LLM path creates structured document analysis and server smoke used GigaChat.
Setup rules and feedback are included in the prompt.
Provider failure is covered by deterministic fallback tests.
Artifacts include provenance, analysis flags, and no-dispatch markers.
Approval and feedback version loop passed in server smoke.
Tests, lint, deploy, health, and server smoke passed.

commands_run: docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python /app/scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_document_api.py
